presentation: Systems Engineer and Full Stack Web/Mobile Developer.
about-paragraphs: I'm a Full Stack developer with over 7 years of experience building web and mobile applications. I specialize in Laravel on the backend and React / React Native on the frontend, and I'm comfortable owning a feature end-to-end — from database design to production deployment.

I've worked on applications that serve real users at scale. At Tiendas Daka, I contributed to platforms used by more than 2 million customers, including a form in Laravel and Livewire that handled over 300,000 users and an e-commerce project built with React, Next.js, NestJS and MedusaJS.

I care a lot about clean, maintainable architecture. I lean toward backend-heavy designs — keeping business logic on the server, using Laravel queues, jobs, WebSockets and well-structured APIs — so that frontends stay light and the system is easy to evolve.

Beyond employment, I run Rigels.io, a personal web hosting service built on Hetzner infrastructure, where I handle everything from server configuration (Nginx, PHP-FPM, SSL) to client support. It keeps me sharp on the DevOps side and gives me real skin in the game as a solo operator.

I'm currently open to new opportunities — whether that's a full-time role, a contract, or a collaboration on something interesting. I work well in agile teams, participate actively in code reviews, and I'm used to writing documentation that actually helps people.
When I'm not coding, I'm usually tinkering with side projects, exploring new tools, or thinking about systems. If you want to see what I'm building, check out my GitHub.

rigels.description: A tool to manage your projects efficiently.
